what: Implement web hooks for project queries and mutations with strict CQRS separation so components never perform direct fetch calls and rely on typed hook interfaces only.

where.description: Add hooks for active project, project list, and archived project list.
Add hooks for create/select/rename/archive/restore with deterministic invalidation.
Add hook behavior tests for success, error, and cache update scenarios.

acceptance.given: A component calling create mutation hook with valid payload
acceptance.then: Queries for active/list are invalidated and reflect new active project data.
Hook exposes typed error state and does not mutate cached project list optimistically.

patterns.name: Web Adapter Boundary
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 2 components call hooks, never fetch directly

patterns.name: CQRS in Web
patterns.reference: ARCHITECTURE.md section 4 query vs mutation hook separation

context: Reusable hooks are required to keep UI logic thin, testable, and aligned with transport contracts.
technicalNotes: Keep read and write hooks in separate files to preserve CQRS clarity. Merge-safe: add new feature hooks + tests without changing existing routeTree.gen.ts. Models: Codex gpt-5.1-codex (low), Claude Haiku 4.5 (low).
